positive: Intricate mandala design featuring stylized botanical elements and celestial bodies, such as crescent moons, star clusters, and abstract nebula swirls. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, central, and isolated on a solid white background, optimized for apparel printing. Style should be a high-detail etching or woodcut illustration, utilizing fine line work, stipple dotwork, and strong negative space contrast. The aesthetic should evoke vintage tattoo art and sacred geometry. Color palette: monochrome black ink. Lighting: Studio quality, perfectly even, emphasizing sharp contours and high resolution.
